name: C4 Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to delivering on the promise of targeted protein degradation, or TPD, science to create a new generation of small-molecule medicines that transform patients lives. Leveraging our proprietary TORPEDO platform, we efficiently design and optimize small molecule protein degraders that are highly active against their desired targets by harnessing the bodys natural process for destroying unwanted proteins.
